series_metadata.series_title: DDD Exiting Employee Personal Files Stored on SSA Servers
series_metadata.series_description: The Division of Disability Determination (DDD) is funded by the Social Security Administration (SSA) to make determinations of whether a claimant is disabled under Ohio law. All work done by a DDD employee is stored on an SSA server in compliance with federal law. DDD employees are designated a personal space on an SSA server to store records that are either personal in nature, transient, drafts or copies of records stored in an SSA database system. When a DDD employee leaves the agency, a copy of these files are backed up on an SSA server that is managed by OOD IT staff to ensure accessibility in case of future legal obligations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: three (3) federal fiscal years employee leaves agency. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
